SACRAMENTO OFFICE
STATE CAPITOL, ROOM 4040
SACRAMENTO, CA 95814
(916) 445-5215

CHARLES STEWART
CHIEF DEPUTY/DISTRICT OFFICE

LOS ANGELES OFFICE
4401 CRENSHAW BLVD.
SUITE 300
LOS ANGELES, CA 90043
(213) 295-6655

California State Senate

DIANE E. WATSON, Ph.D.
TWENTY-EIGHTH SENATORIAL DISTRICT

CHAIRPERSON

Senate Committee on Health and Human Services

COMMITTEES
CHAIRPERSON
HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES
BUDGET AND
FISCAL REVIEW
EDUCATION
JUDICIARY
SELECT COMMITTEE ON
CALIFORNIA'S PARTICIPATION
IN GOVERNMENT
SELECT COMMITTEE ON
CHILDREN AND YOUTH
JT COMMITTEE ON ORGANIZED
CRIME AND GANG VIOLENCE

January 23, 1992

Louisa Menchaca
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 "J" Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Ms. Menchaca:

As per our phone conversation; I was requesting an
opinion on whether or not I could have a private phone
installed in my capitol office at no cost to the state.
My campaign account would cover all costs relative to
this phone. It would be used for a political purpose.

I would appreciate your response by return mail so I
might start the installation as soon as possible.

Many thanks for your consideration of this request.

Sincerely,

Diane E. Watson, Ph.D.
STATE SENATOR

DEW/sb

Not Mailed or Printed at State Expense
